easy.title: Deduplicate & Sort
easy.description: Return sorted list of unique elements from input list.

medium.title: Common & Unique Tags
medium.description: Given two lists of tags, return tuple `(common_set, total_unique_set)`.
hints: Use & for intersection and | for union

hard.title: Find Missing and Duplicate Number
hard.description: Given array of 1..N with one missing and one duplicate, find both using sets.
hints: Use set difference to find missing element

debugging.title: Fix Empty Set Bug
debugging.description: Fix AttributeError on empty set initialization.
bugs: `{}` creates dict, not set. Change initialization to `set()`.
